metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the Travel Planner plugin.

plugins.name: travel-planner
plugins.description: Guides Claude through planning any trip end-to-end — road trips, flights, international travel, city breaks — using a 7-step workflow: activity & dining discovery, adversarial feasibility (pacing, weather, budget, safety, legality, seasonal routes), trip readiness (visa, packing, vaccinations, insurance), schedule, tasks, and reminders — all built around a connector-agnostic travel plan that syncs with your calendar, itinerary, and task apps.
